name: Morphtronic Magnen
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディフォーマー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>・マグネン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｕ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ユー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: ● While in Attack Position: If your opponent controls a face-up monster, this card can only select their highest ATK monster as an attack target. ● While in Defense Position: Your opponent cannot select another monster as an attack target.
mnst_eff: ● While in Attack Position: If your opponent controls a face-up monster, this card can only select their highest ATK monster as an attack target. ● While in Defense Position: Your opponent cannot select another monster as an attack target.
eff: ● While in Attack Position: If your opponent controls a face-up monster, this card can only select their highest ATK monster as an attack target. ● While in Defense Position: Your opponent cannot select another monster as an attack target.

attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
